text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.9 26 

ENHANCED_FIVE_PERCENT_FLAG 

LABEL: Enhanced Medicare 5% Sample Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the beneficiary was ever included in the CCW 5% sample for any year 
(1999+). 

SHORT NAME: EFIVEPCT 

LONG NAME: ENHANCED_FIVE_PERCENT_FLAG 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: Y = Yes, included in enhanced 5% sample 
Null =
